mapper.sql: id, order_code, message, operator_id, operator_name, operator_type, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag

update order_log
order_code = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
message = #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
operator_name = #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_type = #{operatorType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update order_log set order_code = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, message = #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operator_name = #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_type = #{operatorType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
